caption: A news broadcast displays a scene of several men seated at a long table covered with a white cloth, located in a room with a banner that partially reads "ALLIANCE." The men are dressed in formal attire, including suits and traditional Indian clothing. Superimposed over the footage is various Hindi text and portraits of political figures. A red banner at the top asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?", while a red bar at the bottom states, "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजेन्द्र यादव". Portraits identify "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "मंत्री डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", "विजय चौधरी", "डिप्टी CM सब्रत चौधरी", and "विजय सिन्हा". As the video progresses, the on-screen text and layout shift slightly. In the final frames, new text appears, including "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेज़सी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" alongside the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. A digital clock in the bottom right corner consistently reads "10:08 PM".
